message:
feat(bundler): add skill packaging and distribution system

Implement the bundler module for packaging skills into distributable
bundles and managing skill installation from various sources.

src/bundler/mod.rs:
- Module organization and public exports
- BundleManifest and Package type re-exports

src/bundler/manifest.rs:
- BundleManifest struct for bundle metadata
- TOML serialization/deserialization
- Skill inclusion with glob patterns
- Dependency declarations between bundles
- Minimum ms version requirements
- Author and license information
- Validation for manifest completeness

src/bundler/package.rs:
- Package struct for bundle archives
- Tar.gz creation with skill files
- Integrity verification (SHA256 checksums)
- Compression level configuration
- Package extraction and unpacking

src/bundler/github.rs:
- GitHub release integration
- Repository URL parsing (owner/repo format)
- Release asset discovery
- Download with authentication support
- Rate limiting and retry logic

src/bundler/install.rs:
- Installation workflow orchestration
- Source resolution (local, GitHub, registry)
- Dependency resolution and ordering
- Conflict detection for skill names
- Rollback on installation failure

CLI integration:
- ms bundle create <name>: Package skills into bundle
- ms bundle install <source>: Install from file or URL
- ms bundle list: Show installed bundles
- ms bundle remove <name>: Uninstall bundle

Bundle format:
- bundle.toml: Manifest with metadata
- skills/: Directory of skill markdown files
- assets/: Optional supporting files
- checksums.txt: Integrity verification

Supports skill layers (system < global < project) for proper
override semantics when multiple bundles provide the same skill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
